title: Purely Decadent Canadian Pecan Tart
description: A rich and indulgent dessert featuring pecan nuts and tempered chocolate, perfect for a date night, this Canadian dish is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
Add the melted butter, sugar, and eggs to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Press the dough into a 9 inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the crust for 20 minutes, then set aside to cool.
In a saucepan, combine the corn syrup, chocolate chips, and vanilla extract.
Place the saucepan over low heat and cook, stirring constantly, until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth.
Arrange the chopped pecans in the cooled tart shell.
Pour the chocolate mixture over the pecans and smooth the top.
Refrigerate the tart for at least 2 hours before serving.
